personal.name: Muhammad Kamal khan
personal.title: Senior Backend Engineer | Python • Django • AWS • AI-Augmented Development
personal.bio: Senior Backend Engineer with 4+ years of experience building and scaling production systems. Python/Django specialist with deep AWS expertise (Terraform, ECS, RDS, S3). Skilled in system design, performance optimization, zero-downtime migrations, and CI/CD. Proven ability to own backend services end-to-end while leveraging AI tools (Claude) to accelerate development velocity and architectural decisions. Builder of AI-powered side projects. Strong track record mentoring junior engineers.

responsibilities: Owned multiple production backend services end-to-end: design, deployment, monitoring, incident resolution, and mentoring junior engineers on system design patterns
Architected and deployed AWS infrastructure using Terraform (ECS Fargate, RDS Multi-AZ, S3, Redis, ALB, IAM roles) for a multi-tenant SaaS platform serving 10,000+ daily active users
Built S3 presigned URL generation system for CMS file uploads, eliminating direct S3 credential exposure and improving file upload security by ~85%
Designed and evolved REST APIs using Python/Django/DRF with multi-tenant support; implemented vendor-aware filtering, permission scoping, and API versioning
Reduced critical API latency by 40% through PostgreSQL query optimization (index redesign, query plan analysis), Redis caching strategy, and N+1 query elimination
Executed zero-downtime PostgreSQL migrations on millions of rows using binary-safe replication and constraint deferral patterns; achieved 99.99% uptime during migrations
Built and maintained CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions + Docker + AWS ECR); automated deployment validation, reducing deployment failures by ~30% and deployment time by 50%
Implemented production observability stack (Prometheus, Grafana, CloudWatch) with custom dashboards; reduced MTTR (mean time to recovery) by 60% for incident response
Developed performance regression testing framework and established monitoring baselines; caught 5+ performance regressions before production
Built presigned URL & S3 integration for React CMS frontend, enabling secure file uploads with progress tracking and multi-file batch processing
Independently handled production incidents, bug fixes, and performance issues in a remote contract setup
Designed and deployed backend APIs using Python, Flask, and MySQL for production systems
Improved slow-performing endpoints by 80–90% through query optimization and backend refactoring
Added automated tests and service documentation to improve long-term maintainability
Built and integrated backend APIs for payment gateway systems interacting with financial institutions
Contributed to high-availability payment services handling sensitive financial transactions in a regulated environment
Collaborated with frontend and DevOps teams to deliver production releases using Docker and PostgreSQL
Developed backend systems using Django REST Framework and PostgreSQL for complex business workflows
Implemented real-time features using Django Channels and Kafka
Designed APIs, database schemas, and containerized deployments using Docker
Worked on search functionality using Elasticsearch for large datasets
Designed event-driven workflows using Kafka and RabbitMQ, making architectural trade-offs between synchronous APIs and async pipelines based on consistency, latency, and failure modes
Developed backend services using Django and Django REST Framework
Designed relational database schemas and optimized SQL queries
Applied OOP principles to build maintainable backend codebases

projects.name: Synctoon
projects.description: Production-ready AI-powered 2D animation tool using LLMs and voice synthesis. Converts text scripts and audio into complete animated videos with automated lip-sync, character expressions, and frame-based rendering. Open-source on GitHub.
highlights: Generates professional 2D animations using AI with lip-sync perfectly aligned to audio and dynamic character expressions
Implements frame-by-frame rendering with motion control and character consistency across scenes
Democratizes animation for storytellers, educators, YouTubers, and hobbyists through AI automation
Featured on YouTube with 2K+ views; demonstrated production-ready quality for AI-powered creative tools
Showcases end-to-end AI pipeline: script parsing → voice analysis → animation generation → video composition

projects.name: ToonFrame Architect
projects.description: AI-Powered Animation Storyboard Generator that transforms written stories and scripts into detailed animation storyboards using Google's Gemini AI.
highlights: Script-to-storyboard conversion with dual start/end frames per scene
Consistency Bible for character & environment tracking across scenes
Supports multiple image resolutions: 1K, 2K, 4K for professional workflows
Export storyboards as PDF or ZIP with modern 2D cartoon style optimization

projects.name: Inkwell Apprentice
projects.description: AI-Powered Drawing Practice Tool designed to help users practice and improve their inkpen drawing skills with structured exercises and PDF practice sheets.
highlights: Generates drawing practice sheets in PDF format with structured learning progression
AI-powered assistance for creating visual prompts and drawing exercises
Supports beginner to advanced skill levels with automated practice material creation
Lightweight, fast interface with placeholder image generation for handling failures

projects.name: 2D Mouth Lipsyncing Tool Website
projects.description: Innovative web-based tool that automates the process of creating 2D mouth lipsync animations using only audio files and text scripts.
highlights: Generates high-quality mouth lipsync animation with green background for easy compositing
User-friendly interface accessible for both experienced and novice animators
Automated animation generation saves time while maintaining professional quality
Green screen output allows easy integration into other video projects

projects.name: Personal Agent Workspace
projects.description: An open-source autonomous workspace operating system built with Claude AI. Demonstrates AI-augmented knowledge work: daily standups, task orchestration, email management, persistent memory, multi-domain tracking (work, fitness, content), and Obsidian vault integration.
highlights: Autonomous daily standup: AI reads context, generates status snapshot, routes work intelligently
Persistent memory system: user profiles, feedback, projects, external references—all auto-indexed and searchable
Email management automation: fetch Gmail, track contacts, draft responses, log interactions
Multi-domain tracking: Taleemabad (work), fitness, business, content, contacts—unified in Obsidian vault
Serves as open-source blueprint for AI-augmented personal knowledge management
Deployed at https://github.com/Orenda-Project/personal-agent-workspace

projects.name: Taleemabad CMS (React Frontend)
projects.description: Modern React-based content management system replacing legacy Retool. Handles training management, media asset uploads, multi-vendor support, and quiz builder with S3 integration and presigned URLs.
highlights: S3 presigned URL integration: secure browser-to-S3 file uploads with progress tracking and batch processing
Multi-vendor architecture: vendor-aware filtering, level scoping, organization-specific course types
Responsive, modern UI with dark theme, loading states, and smooth animations
API integration: real-time data sync with Django backend; handles 10,000+ daily active users
Docker deployment ready with GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline
Replaces Retool with custom, maintainable codebase; deploying to production in April 2025

projects.name: Portfolio Website
projects.description: Modern, fully responsive React portfolio website with dynamic JSON data loading and professional PDF CV generation capabilities.
highlights: Dark theme with glassmorphism effects and smooth animations
PDF CV generation client-side with professional formatting
Dynamic content management via single JSON file for easy updates
Component-based architecture with beautiful UI animations and gradient accents

projects.name: PostgreSQL Data Migrator
projects.description: Robust Python suite designed to efficiently transfer tables and data between PostgreSQL databases with advanced constraint handling.
highlights: Schema reflection with automatic table creation and constraint handling
Bulk data migration with configurable chunks for optimal performance
Deferred constraint handling for complex schemas and table exclusions
Comprehensive logging and monitoring with secure environment variable support

projects.name: PostgreSQL Streaming Physical Replication
projects.description: Docker-based setup demonstrating PostgreSQL Streaming Physical Replication for high availability and disaster recovery.
highlights: Primary-Replica architecture with real-time WAL streaming and Hot Standby mode
Fully containerized setup with auto-configuration of replication slots
Supports monitoring of replication lag and failover testing scenarios
Near real-time replication with crash-consistent, byte-for-byte data integrity

projects.name: Local-to-Internet Tunnel
projects.description: Lightweight shell-script-based tool that instantly exposes local backends to the internet using Cloudflare tunnels with auto-detection.
highlights: Auto-detection of local backends (Django, React/Node, Flask, Java, etc.)
Instant public URL generation with comprehensive process management
Free alternative to ngrok with background process management and auto-recovery
Simplifies webhook testing, API sharing, and live demos without deployment

projects.name: Ubuntu Dev Setup
projects.description: Automated shell script that streamlines Ubuntu development environment setup by installing essential development tools with a single command.
highlights: One-command setup installing Git, VS Code, Postman, Teams, pgAdmin, Docker
Ensures consistent development environment across team members
Eliminates repetitive manual installations and configuration errors
Speeds up onboarding process for new developers significantly

ai_work.title: AI & Autonomous Development
ai_work.description: Building with AI as a core part of the development workflow. Using Claude to accelerate architecture decisions, code generation, debugging, and autonomous agent systems.

highlights.title: Personal Agent Workspace (Open Source)
highlights.description: An autonomous workspace operating system built with Claude. Demonstrates how AI can manage complex, multi-domain work: daily standups, task orchestration, email management, memory persistence, and project tracking.
highlights.impact: Single developer managing 5+ concurrent projects with 95% automation; serves as a blueprint for AI-augmented knowledge work

highlights.title: Claude-Augmented Development Methodology
highlights.description: Daily workflow: Use Claude for architecture design, code generation, debugging, test coverage analysis, and decision-making. Langfuse tracing for observability of AI-assisted work.
highlights.impact: 30-40% faster feature delivery compared to traditional development; higher code quality through AI pair-programming

highlights.title: AI Project Portfolio
highlights.description: Creator of production-ready AI-powered tools: Synctoon (AI 2D animation), ToonFrame Architect (storyboard generation), Inkwell Apprentice (drawing practice). Each project demonstrates LLM integration, vector databases, and creative AI applications.
highlights.impact: 5+ open-source AI projects; Synctoon featured on YouTube with thousands of views

channels.description: Daily blogs, tech insights, career advice, and personal vlogs about life as a software engineer.

education.details: Focus on software engineering, backend systems, and databases
